posts.title: 위로보틱스 950억 투자, 엔비디아 인정한 K-휴머노이드 선두 도약
posts.summary: 위로보틱스가 950억 시리즈B 투자로 K-휴머노이드 및 피지컬 AI 시장의 독보적 선두에 섰습니다. 윔의 상업적 성공과 알렉스 개발, 엔비디아, AWS 등 글로벌 협력으로 로봇 시장의 미래를 개척합니다.
posts.description: 위로보틱스가 950억 시리즈B 투자로 K-휴머노이드 및 피지컬 AI 시장의 독보적 선두에 섰습니다. 윔의 상업적 성공과 알렉스 개발, 엔비디아, AWS 등 글로벌 협력으로 로봇 시장의 미래를 개척합니다.

posts.title: xAI Grok 4.3 Unveiled: Elon Musk's Ultra-Low Cost AI with 1M Token Context, Agentic Power & Custom Voices
posts.summary: xAI's Grok 4.3 is set to redefine the AI market by offering an ultra-low-cost, high-performance agentic AI model , featuring an always-on reasoning structure and a vast 1 million token context window…
posts.description: xAI's Grok 4.3 is set to redefine the AI market by offering an ultra-low-cost, high-performance agentic AI model , featuring an always-on reasoning structure and a vast 1 million token context window , making advanced AI capabilities significantly more accessible and efficient for complex, accuracy-critical tasks.

posts.title: Claude Opus 4.8 Revolutionizes Microsoft 365 Copilot: Unlocking Enterprise Productivity, Multi-Model AI & Advanced Security
posts.summary: The deep integration of Anthropic's Claude AI , including the powerful Claude Opus 4.8 , into the Microsoft 365 Copilot ecosystem significantly enhances business productivity by offering advanced…
posts.description: The deep integration of Anthropic's Claude AI , including the powerful Claude Opus 4.8 , into the Microsoft 365 Copilot ecosystem significantly enhances business productivity by offering advanced cross-application contextual understanding and automated workflows across Excel, PowerPoint, Word, and Outlook , all while providing more AI power within Copilot at the same existing cost .

posts.title: Adobe's Living PDF Revolution: AI-Powered Interactive Documents, Experience Sharing & Enhanced Security Insights
posts.summary: Adobe is transforming static PDFs into dynamic, AI-powered digital experience platforms , enabling conversational interaction , automated content creation , and the innovative concept of experience…
posts.description: Adobe is transforming static PDFs into dynamic, AI-powered digital experience platforms , enabling conversational interaction , automated content creation , and the innovative concept of experience sharing .
